pharma.title: Pharma Q4 outlook mixed: Hospitals steady, generics face revlimid drag
pharma.summary: Indian pharma and healthcare firms face a mixed March quarter. While hospitals anticipate steady growth, generic drugmakers grapple with lost Revlimid sales and pricing challenges. Lupin and Divi's are poised for strong performance, with Sun Pharma and...

providers.title: Top private hospitals may drop out of government health plans
providers.summary: While hospital chains have not announced that they are limiting their participation in government health programmes, Max Healthcare, Narayana Health, Fortis Healthcare and HealthCare Global are among those that have reported revenue impact and highlighted...

providers.title: M&A boom sweeps Gujarat’s pvt healthcare market
providers.summary: Recent deals indicate a clear strategic shift among large hospital chains, which are increasingly expanding capacity and strengthening regional presence through acquisitions rather than greenfield projects.

providers.title: Centre eases building height norms to allow vertical expansion of Hospitals
providers.summary: According to NATHEALTH, the reform will enable hospitals to better utilise existing infrastructure, improve operational efficiencies, while reducing the need for new greenfield projects that are both capital-intensive and time-consuming.

diagnostics.title: Guardant Health to launch blood-based cancer test in India with Zydus Lifesciences
diagnostics.summary: Guardant Health is set to introduce a groundbreaking blood test in India for early cancer detection. This multi-cancer test, co-marketed by Zydus Lifesciences in India, aims to identify various cancers like lung, breast, and prostate. The initiative targets...

diagnostics.title: Study describes blood test that might reveal one's illness trajectory, response to treatment
